app_info.subtitle: Market insights & portfolio view
app_info.description: Longbridge brings US, HK, A-share, and SG market research into ChatGPT: live quotes, candlestick charts, order-book depth and trades, fundamentals and financial statements, valuations, analyst ratings and estimates, finance calendars, news, filings, options and warrants, stock screeners, market movers, and ranking lists. With the user's Longbridge OAuth credentials it also provides read-only access to their account and portfolio (balances, positions, profit & loss, margin, cash flow, statements) and order and execution history, and lets them manage watchlists, price alerts, and community share lists. The endpoint never places, modifies, or cancels trades, never sets up recurring (DCA) investments, never submits IPO orders, and never moves money — no deposits, withdrawals, or bank-card access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Get account cash balance and asset summary. It is a read-only view of the user's own account, portfolio, or order data and never places trades, moves funds, or modifies records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads the authenticated user's account, portfolio, or order data from Longbridge's brokerage backend over the network.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, trade, publish, or change any stored state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Get A/H share premium historical K-line data. It only reads data and does not place orders or modify any account, watchlist, or stored state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries Longbridge's external market-data and research services over the network for live data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, trade, publish, or change any stored state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Get A/H share premium intraday time-share data. It only reads data and does not place orders or modify any account, watchlist, or stored state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries Longbridge's external market-data and research services over the network for live data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, trade, publish, or change any stored state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a price alert, a write to the user's alert settings, so it is not read-only. It never places trades or moves money.
justifications.open_world_justification: Sends the change to the authenticated user's Longbridge account (watchlist, alert, or community list) over the network.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds or updates the user's own watchlist, alert, or community data but does not delete or overwrite unrelated records, and never trades, moves funds, or routes orders.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes a price alert, a write to the user's alert settings, so it is not read-only. It never places trades or moves money.
justifications.open_world_justification: Sends the change to the authenticated user's Longbridge account (watchlist, alert, or community list) over the network.
justifications.destructive_justification: This permanently deletes a price alert and cannot be undone without recreating it, so it carries a destructive hint; it still never trades or moves money.

justifications.read_only_justification: Disables an existing price alert, changing alert state, so it is not read-only. It never places trades or moves money.
justifications.open_world_justification: Sends the change to the authenticated user's Longbridge account (watchlist, alert, or community list) over the network.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds or updates the user's own watchlist, alert, or community data but does not delete or overwrite unrelated records, and never trades, moves funds, or routes orders.

justifications.destructive_justification: It adds or updates the user's own watchlist, alert, or community data but does not delete or overwrite unrelated records, and never trades, moves funds, or routes orders.

test_cases.description: Review live quote, order book, and trade activity for a US stock.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me AAPL.US latest quote, top of book depth, and recent trades.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the latest quote, current order book levels, and recent public trades for AAPL.US with timestamps and prices.

test_cases.description: Compare intraday and daily chart data for a Hong Kong stock.
test_cases.user_prompt: For 700.HK, get today's intraday line and the last 60 daily candles.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns intraday minute data and daily OHLCV candles for 700.HK without placing any order.

test_cases.description: Build a fundamental and research snapshot for a security.
test_cases.user_prompt: Summarize TSLA.US: company profile, latest financial report, valuation, analyst consensus, EPS forecast, institution ratings, top shareholders, and business segments.
test_cases.tools_triggered: company, financial_report_latest, valuation, consensus, forecast_eps, institution_rating, shareholder_top, business_segments
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a read-only research summary using company, financial, valuation, analyst, shareholder, and segment data.

test_cases.description: Research news, filings, and upcoming calendar events.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find recent NVDA.US news and filings, search market news for AI chips, and check US earnings calendar events from 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-14.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns recent symbol news, regulatory filing links, keyword news results, and matching finance calendar events in the requested date range.

test_cases.description: Use market discovery tools and options data.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find US top movers and hot rank list entries, screen US stocks with market cap above 100B, and show AAPL.US option expiry dates with the nearest chain.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns market mover events, ranked stocks, screener matches, and option expiry dates with strikes and Greeks for the nearest expiry.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for trade execution requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Buy 10 shares of AAPL.US at market price and then cancel my open TSLA.US order.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not place or cancel orders; this endpoint does not expose trade execution or order routing.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for recurring-investment (DCA) setup.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Set up a recurring weekly $100 investment into VOO.US.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not create or modify recurring (DCA) investment plans; that capability is not part of this endpoint.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for money movement.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Withdraw $5,000 from my account to my linked bank card.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not move money; deposits, withdrawals, and bank-card access are outside the submitted surface.
